name: Poppyseed Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat eggs in a large bowl.
3. Blend in juice, butter, lemon peel, lemon juice, and vanilla.
4. Combine dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and poppy seeds.
5. Gradually add the dry mixture to the egg mixture, beating until well blended.
6. Pour batter evenly into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
7. Bake for 20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean and edges are golden brown.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
9. Serve warm or at room temperature.
